subcategories.name: Romantic Partner
subcategories.description: Romantic, emotional, or everyday messages to send to your partner

required_fields.label: Situation / Topic
required_fields.placeholder: What do you want to say? E.g.: I miss you, we had a fight, I want to say goodnight...

subcategories.name: Ex Partner
subcategories.description: Messages to an ex: reconnecting, closure, apology, or a simple hello

required_fields.label: Background
required_fields.placeholder: What happened, what was the relationship like, any details you want to add...

subcategories.name: Crush
subcategories.description: First messages or conversation starters to send to someone you like

required_fields.label: How do you know them?
required_fields.placeholder: Same school, saw them on social media, mutual friend...

subcategories.name: Friend
subcategories.description: Messages to a friend: check-in, apology, support, or just catching up

required_fields.label: Situation / Topic
required_fields.placeholder: What do you want to say? E.g.: Haven't talked in a while, we had a fight, I want to cheer you up...

subcategories.name: Family
subcategories.description: Messages to family members: parent, sibling, grandparent, or other relatives

required_fields.label: Situation / Topic
required_fields.placeholder: What do you want to say? E.g.: I miss you, I want to thank you, I need to talk about something...

subcategories.name: Apology
subcategories.description: Heartfelt apology messages to send to anyone

required_fields.label: Reason for apology
required_fields.placeholder: What are you apologizing for? E.g.: I broke a promise, I was late, I said something hurtful...

subcategories.name: Rejection
subcategories.description: Polite or firm rejection messages for any situation

required_fields.label: What was offered or requested?
required_fields.placeholder: Briefly describe what you're declining...

subcategories.name: Congratulations
subcategories.description: Congratulation messages for special occasions and achievements

subcategories.name: Personal Photo
subcategories.description: Caption text and hashtags for a personal photo post

required_fields.label: What does the photo show?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Sunset photo from my rooftop, coffee and laptop on my desk...

subcategories.name: Personal Story
subcategories.description: Post text for sharing a personal experience or thought

required_fields.label: Story / Topic
required_fields.placeholder: What do you want to share? E.g.: Something surprising happened today, a lesson I learned...

optional_fields.label: Ending CTA (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: What do you think? Has this happened to you?

subcategories.name: Product Promotion
subcategories.description: Social media promotional copy for a product or service

required_fields.label: Product / Service name
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Coffee shop, software app, handmade jewelry...

required_fields.label: Product description
required_fields.placeholder: What does it do, what makes it different?

required_fields.label: Target audience
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Professionals 25-35, parents, students...

subcategories.name: Campaign
subcategories.description: Social media campaign copy for a brand, product, or event

required_fields.label: Campaign / Event name
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Summer sale, new collection launch, pop-up event...

required_fields.label: Campaign details
required_fields.placeholder: What's being offered, when, where, how to participate?

required_fields.label: Target audience
required_fields.placeholder: Who is it for?

optional_fields.label: Urgency / Deadline (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: This weekend only, limited stock...

subcategories.name: Sports Club
subcategories.description: Social media posts for a sports club or team

required_fields.label: Club / Team name
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Club name or team...

subcategories.name: Motivation
subcategories.description: Inspiring and motivational social media content

required_fields.label: Topic / Theme
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Morning routine, learning from failure, goal setting...

subcategories.name: Professional Email
subcategories.description: Clear, well-structured professional emails for any workplace situation

required_fields.label: Purpose / What do you need to say?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Requesting a meeting, sharing an update, asking for feedback...

required_fields.label: Recipient's role
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: My manager, a client, a colleague, HR department...

optional_fields.label: Preferred subject line (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: Leave blank to let AI suggest one

subcategories.name: Follow-Up
subcategories.description: Follow-up emails after meetings, applications, proposals, or unanswered messages

required_fields.label: What are you following up on?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Job interview last week, proposal I sent, meeting we had...

subcategories.name: Apology Email
subcategories.description: Professional apology emails for workplace or business situations

required_fields.label: What happened?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Missed a deadline, sent incorrect information, was late to a meeting...

required_fields.label: Recipient's role
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: My client, my manager, a colleague...

optional_fields.label: Solution or remedy offered (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: I've already corrected the report, I can reschedule...

subcategories.name: Cold Outreach
subcategories.description: Cold emails to potential clients, partners, or collaborators

required_fields.label: What do you want from this person?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Pitch my services, explore a partnership, get a meeting...

required_fields.label: Who are you reaching out to?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Startup founder, marketing director, agency owner...

required_fields.label: What value do you offer?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: I help SaaS companies reduce churn by 30%...

optional_fields.label: Mutual connection or trigger (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: We met at XConf, I read your recent article...

subcategories.name: Complaint Email
subcategories.description: Formal complaint emails to companies, service providers, or businesses

required_fields.label: Subject of complaint
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Defective product, poor service, billing error...

required_fields.label: What happened?
required_fields.placeholder: Describe the issue, when it occurred, how it affected you...

required_fields.label: What do you want?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Full refund, replacement, apology, investigation...

subcategories.name: Thank You Email
subcategories.description: Warm, professional thank you emails for any context

required_fields.label: What are you thanking them for?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Job interview, helping with a project, a gift, a referral...

required_fields.label: Who are you thanking?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Interviewer, mentor, colleague, client...

optional_fields.label: Something specific to mention (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: The advice about X really stood out...

subcategories.name: Cover Letter
subcategories.description: Compelling cover letters for job applications

required_fields.label: Job title
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Senior Product Designer, Marketing Manager...

required_fields.label: Company name
required_fields.placeholder: Company you're applying to

required_fields.label: Your key skills / strengths
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: 5 years in UX design, led teams of 10, expertise in Figma and research...

required_fields.label: Relevant experience
required_fields.placeholder: What makes you a strong candidate for this role?

optional_fields.label: Referral or how you found the role (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Referred by Jane Smith, found on LinkedIn...

subcategories.name: Job Application
subcategories.description: Short job application messages for forms, LinkedIn, or direct outreach

required_fields.label: Position applying for
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Frontend Developer, Sales Executive...

required_fields.label: Company name
required_fields.placeholder: Company name

required_fields.label: Your background
required_fields.placeholder: Your experience, skills, and why you're a fit for this role...

subcategories.name: LinkedIn Message
subcategories.description: LinkedIn connection requests and direct messages

required_fields.label: Context / what makes this relevant?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: I admire their work, we share a mutual connection, I read their article on X...

optional_fields.label: Mutual connection or trigger (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: We both worked at X, attended Y event...

subcategories.name: Promotion Request
subcategories.description: Messages or emails to request a promotion or salary raise

required_fields.label: Current role / title
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Junior Developer, Account Manager...

required_fields.label: Desired role / title
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Senior Developer, Head of Accounts...

required_fields.label: Key achievements since last review
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Led 3 major projects, grew revenue by 20%, mentored 2 junior staff...

optional_fields.label: Market rate reference (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Market rate for this role is $X according to Glassdoor...

subcategories.name: Business Proposal
subcategories.description: Concise business proposals and pitches to potential clients or partners

required_fields.label: Your service or product
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Web development agency, SaaS tool, consulting service...

required_fields.label: Who you're pitching to
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: E-commerce brands, law firms, restaurants...

required_fields.label: Core value proposition
required_fields.placeholder: What problem do you solve and what results do you deliver?

optional_fields.label: Pricing or package hint (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Starting from $2,000/month, fixed project fee...

subcategories.name: Client Email
subcategories.description: Professional emails for managing client relationships

required_fields.label: Details
required_fields.placeholder: Describe the situation and what needs to be communicated...

subcategories.name: Contract Summary
subcategories.description: Plain-language summaries of contract terms for clients or stakeholders

required_fields.label: Contract type
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Service agreement, NDA, freelance contract, lease...

required_fields.label: Key terms and conditions
required_fields.placeholder: Paste or describe the main points: scope, payment, duration, termination, IP...

required_fields.label: Parties involved
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: My agency (Provider) and Acme Corp (Client)

optional_fields.label: Signing deadline (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Please sign by Friday 20th June

subcategories.name: Payment Reminder
subcategories.description: Professional payment reminder messages and emails

required_fields.label: Due date
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: June 15th, already overdue...

required_fields.label: Invoice reference
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Invoice #INV-2024-089

subcategories.name: Motivation Letter
subcategories.description: Personal statements and motivation letters for university or program applications

required_fields.label: Program / Field
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: MSc Computer Science, MBA, LLB Law...

required_fields.label: University / Institution
required_fields.placeholder: University or institution name

required_fields.label: Why this program?
required_fields.placeholder: Your motivation, what drew you to this field...

required_fields.label: Academic and professional background
required_fields.placeholder: Relevant degrees, work experience, projects, achievements...

optional_fields.label: Career goal (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: Where do you want this degree to take you?

subcategories.name: Scholarship Application
subcategories.description: Scholarship application letters and personal statements

required_fields.label: Scholarship name / type
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Chevening, Fulbright, merit-based departmental grant...

required_fields.label: Why do you deserve this scholarship?
required_fields.placeholder: Your merits, achievements, impact you aim to make...

required_fields.label: Academic background
required_fields.placeholder: Degrees, GPA, research, publications, awards...

optional_fields.label: Financial need context (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: First-generation student, limited family income...

subcategories.name: Professor Email
subcategories.description: Emails to professors for academic requests and questions

required_fields.label: Context / details
required_fields.placeholder: Explain your situation, what you need, and any relevant background...

optional_fields.label: Course / subject name (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Advanced Statistics, History of Art...

subcategories.name: Extension Request
subcategories.description: Requests for deadline extensions on assignments or exams

required_fields.label: Assignment / exam name
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Final essay, midterm paper, group project...

required_fields.label: Original deadline
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: June 20th

required_fields.label: Reason for requesting extension
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Medical issue, family emergency, unexpected workload...

required_fields.label: Requested new deadline
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: June 27th, one week extension

subcategories.name: University Appeal
subcategories.description: Formal appeal letters to universities for academic decisions

required_fields.label: Your situation
required_fields.placeholder: What decision are you appealing and why? Include relevant facts and circumstances...

required_fields.label: What outcome are you requesting?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Reassessment of my grade, reinstatement to program...

optional_fields.label: Supporting evidence (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Medical certificate, extenuating circumstances letter...

subcategories.name: Internship Application
subcategories.description: Application messages and emails for internship positions

required_fields.label: Company name
required_fields.placeholder: Company you're applying to

required_fields.label: Internship role
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Marketing intern, software engineering intern...

required_fields.label: Your background
required_fields.placeholder: Relevant studies, skills, projects, previous experience...

required_fields.label: Why this company/role?
required_fields.placeholder: What excites you about this opportunity?

subcategories.name: Petition
subcategories.description: Petition drafts to submit to government agencies, municipalities, or public authorities

required_fields.label: Petition subject
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Leave request, rights violation report, permit application...

required_fields.label: Situation description
required_fields.placeholder: Describe the issue or request in detail...

required_fields.label: Expected outcome
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Start an investigation, issue a permit, correct a record...

required_fields.label: Authority to address
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Mayor's Office, Ministry of Health, Police Department...

optional_fields.label: Your role / status (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Citizen, tenant, student, business owner...

subcategories.name: Complaint Letter
subcategories.description: Formal complaint letters about a product, service, or individual

required_fields.label: Subject of complaint
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Defective product, poor service, noise complaint...

required_fields.label: Complaint details
required_fields.placeholder: What happened, when, how it affected you, what evidence you have...

required_fields.label: Recipient / party complained about
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Company name, institution, person's role...

required_fields.label: Expected resolution
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Refund, apology, investigation, correction...

subcategories.name: Official Request
subcategories.description: Official letters requesting information, documents, or action from an institution

required_fields.label: Request subject
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Information request, document approval, access rights, permit...

required_fields.label: Reason / justification
required_fields.placeholder: Why are you making this request? What right or need is involved?

required_fields.label: Institution / person being requested
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Bank, university, government agency, company...

subcategories.name: Legal Objection
subcategories.description: Formal objection and appeal petitions against a decision, policy, or action

required_fields.label: Subject of objection
required_fields.placeholder: Which decision or action are you objecting to? Explain in detail...

required_fields.label: Legal basis / justification
required_fields.placeholder: What right was violated? What legal regulation are you basing this on?

required_fields.label: Authority being petitioned
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Court, appellate board, mediator, administration...

optional_fields.label: Urgency / deadline (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: I request a stay of execution, 30-day appeal period...

subcategories.name: Consumer Complaint
subcategories.description: Consumer rights complaints to companies, regulators, or ombudsmen

required_fields.label: Product or service
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Laptop, electricity provider, airline, insurance policy...

required_fields.label: What went wrong?
required_fields.placeholder: Describe the issue, dates, how it affected you, what steps you've already taken...

required_fields.label: Company / provider name
required_fields.placeholder: Company or provider name

required_fields.label: Desired resolution
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Full refund, replacement, compensation, account cancellation...

subcategories.name: Doctor Visit Request
subcategories.description: Messages to book or request an urgent or routine doctor's appointment

required_fields.label: Symptoms or reason for visit
required_fields.placeholder: Describe your symptoms or the reason you need to see a doctor...

required_fields.label: How long have you had these symptoms?
Urgency
options: Would like to be seen soon

optional_fields.label: Existing conditions / medications (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Diabetic, on blood pressure medication, asthma...

subcategories.name: Hospital Request
subcategories.description: Formal requests to hospitals or healthcare institutions

required_fields.label: Details of your request
required_fields.placeholder: Describe your situation and exactly what you need from the hospital...

optional_fields.label: Patient name (optional)
optional_fields.placeholder: Patient's full name if writing on behalf of someone

subcategories.name: Second Opinion Request
subcategories.description: Messages to request a second medical opinion from another doctor or specialist

required_fields.label: Current diagnosis or condition
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Type 2 diabetes, herniated disc, suspected appendicitis...

required_fields.label: Recommended or current treatment
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Surgery recommended, prescribed metformin, watchful waiting...

required_fields.label: Why do you want a second opinion?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Uncertain about surgery, side effects concern me, diagnosis feels unclear...

subcategories.name: Prescription Query
subcategories.description: Messages to doctors or pharmacists about medications and prescriptions

required_fields.label: Medication name
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Amoxicillin, metformin, omeprazole...

required_fields.label: Details
required_fields.placeholder: Describe your specific question or concern about the medication...

subcategories.name: Insurance Claim
subcategories.description: Messages and letters for medical insurance claims and disputes

required_fields.label: Incident / treatment details
required_fields.placeholder: What treatment or procedure are you claiming for? When did it occur? What was the cost?

required_fields.label: What do you want?
required_fields.placeholder: E.g.: Full reimbursement, partial coverage, denial appeal, explanation of decision...
